violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Observed open bags of food in walk in freezer.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items. -Observed bulb in vent hood that did not have a shield over it.

Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored, handled, dispensed in a manner to protect from contamination. -Observed boxes of single service items on floor of Meat Department.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. -Observed food dumped in hand sink at front counter.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Observed floor under cold hold unit in food prep area needs to be cleaned.

Lighting. — --Lighting did not have protective shielding in areas where there is exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, or unwrapped single-service items . -Observed bulb in ventilation hood over fryer did not have a shield around it.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
